PCI_DSS_1.1.source_control_title: Network security controls are defined and documented
PCI_DSS_1.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for installing and maintaining network security controls are defined and documented.
PCI_DSS_1.1.target_control_title: Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access

PCI_DSS_1.2.source_control_text: Network security controls are implemented to restrict connections between trusted and untrusted networks.
PCI_DSS_1.2.target_control_title: Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access

PCI_DSS_2.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for applying secure configurations to all system components are defined and understood.

PCI_DSS_2.2.source_control_text: System components are configured and managed securely to reduce the risk of attack.

PCI_DSS_3.1.source_control_title: Account data protection processes are defined
PCI_DSS_3.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for protecting stored account data are defined and documented.
PCI_DSS_3.1.target_control_title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected

PCI_DSS_3.3.source_control_title: Sensitive authentication data is not stored after authorization
PCI_DSS_3.3.source_control_text: Sensitive authentication data is not retained after authorization, even if encrypted.
PCI_DSS_3.3.target_control_title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected
PCI_DSS_3.3.gap_description: Partial — PCI requires specific data deletion, NIST is broader protection

PCI_DSS_3.5.source_control_title: Primary account numbers are secured wherever stored
PCI_DSS_3.5.source_control_text: Primary account number (PAN) is secured wherever it is stored using strong cryptography.
PCI_DSS_3.5.target_control_title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected

PCI_DSS_4.1.source_control_title: Processes for protecting data in transit are defined
PCI_DSS_4.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for protecting cardholder data with strong cryptography during transmission are defined.
PCI_DSS_4.1.target_control_title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected

PCI_DSS_5.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for protecting all systems against malware are defined and documented.
PCI_DSS_5.1.target_control_title: Computing hardware and software are monitored

PCI_DSS_5.2.source_control_title: Malicious software is prevented or detected and addressed
PCI_DSS_5.2.source_control_text: Malicious software is prevented, or detected and addressed, on all applicable system components.
PCI_DSS_5.2.target_control_title: Computing hardware and software are monitored

PCI_DSS_6.1.source_control_title: Secure software development processes are defined
PCI_DSS_6.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for developing and maintaining secure systems and software are defined.
PCI_DSS_6.1.target_control_title: Secure software development practices are integrated

PCI_DSS_6.3.source_control_title: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed
PCI_DSS_6.3.source_control_text: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed through patch management and vulnerability scanning.
PCI_DSS_6.3.target_control_title: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded

PCI_DSS_7.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for restricting access to system components and cardholder data are defined.
PCI_DSS_7.1.target_control_title: Access permissions and authorizations are managed

PCI_DSS_8.1.source_control_title: Identification and authentication processes are defined
PCI_DSS_8.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for identifying users and authenticating access are defined and documented.
PCI_DSS_8.1.target_control_title: Identities and credentials for authorized users are managed

PCI_DSS_8.3.source_control_text: Strong authentication for users and administrators is established and managed.
PCI_DSS_8.3.target_control_title: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated

PCI_DSS_9.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for restricting physical access to cardholder data are defined and documented.
PCI_DSS_9.1.target_control_title: Physical access to assets is managed, monitored, and enforced

PCI_DSS_10.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for logging and monitoring all access to system components are defined.
PCI_DSS_10.1.target_control_title: Log records are generated to enable monitoring

PCI_DSS_10.2.source_control_title: Audit logs are implemented to support detection
PCI_DSS_10.2.source_control_text: Audit logs are implemented to support the detection of anomalies and suspicious activity.
PCI_DSS_10.2.target_control_title: Networks and network services are monitored

PCI_DSS_11.1.source_control_text: Processes and mechanisms for regularly testing security of systems and networks are defined.
PCI_DSS_11.1.target_control_title: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded

PCI_DSS_12.1.source_control_text: A comprehensive information security policy that governs cybersecurity is known and current.

PCI_DSS_12.10.source_control_text: Suspected and confirmed security incidents are responded to immediately according to a defined plan.
PCI_DSS_12.10.target_control_title: The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties
